HudEnabled.Name: Enable Party HUD
HudEnabled.Hint: Show the Party HUD panel on the game canvas.

RestrictToHpOnly.Name: Restrict player visibility
RestrictToHpOnly.Hint: When enabled, players only see HP bars for other party members. When disabled (default), players see full data for everyone.

PartyFolderName.Name: Party folder name
PartyFolderName.Hint: Name of the Actors folder whose contents appear in the Party HUD. Defaults to 'The Party'. If no folder with this name exists, all player-owned characters are shown instead.

AutopilotEnabled.Name: Enable NPC Autopilot
AutopilotEnabled.Hint: When enabled, NPC attacks and abilities automatically roll through their full pipeline (attack → damage → conditions) without dialog interruptions. Area abilities will still pause to let the GM place the template.

AutoApplyDamage.Name: Auto-apply damage
AutoApplyDamage.Hint: Automatically deduct damage from target HP after rolls. Disable to see roll results without modifying HP.

AutoApplyConditions.Name: Auto-apply conditions
AutoApplyConditions.Hint: Automatically add conditions to targets based on hit results and ability effects (e.g. Grabbed on a hit with the Grab trait).
